title: CentoUI Global Registry
description: Global configuration for the CentoUI registry. Defines properties that every CentoUI project must have.

packageDeps.description: npm packages required in every CentoUI project. The CLI installs these during `centoui init` before any components are added.

additionalProperties.description: Semver version range for the package (e.g. '^1.0.0', '~2.3.1', '>=3.0.0').
